mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, key_name, key_prefix, key_hash, salt, key_hash_algo, scopes, enabled, expires_at, last_used_at, created_by, revoked_by, revoked_at, created_at
mapper.select: select from batch.api_key where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by created_at desc
select from batch.api_key where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} limit 1
select from batch.api_key where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and key_name = #{keyName} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into batch.api_key (tenant_id, key_name, key_prefix, key_hash, salt, key_hash_algo, scopes, enabled, expires_at, created_by) values (#{tenantId}, #{keyName}, #{keyPrefix}, #{keyHash}, #{salt}, #{keyHashAlgo}, #{scopes}, true, #{expiresAt}, #{operator})
mapper.update: update batch.api_key set enabled = false, revoked_by = #{operator}, revoked_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and enabled = true
